summary: Pitch‑perfect soundboard capture featuring a flawless, extended “Here Comes Sunshine” performance.
review: All three reviewers give the recording five stars, lauding Charlie Miller’s pitch‑correction and crystal‑clear mix that makes the show sound like a gold‑standard soundboard tape. The highlight is the unusually long, immaculate version of “Here Comes Sunshine,” which they describe as one of the best performances of the year. No criticisms were noted, indicating both the musical set and the technical restoration are highly regarded.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star reviews praise both the show’s performance (especially “Here Comes Sunshine”) and the immaculate, pitch‑corrected soundboard source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch‑correction applied; crystal‑clear balance and bass response; described as “Gold Standard” soundboard quality with no audible flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not comment on set structure, but overall energy and flow are praised alongside the superb recording.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned positively (“Hopefully Jerry is smiling”), implying his playing contributed to the perfect vibe.
